title: Weekly Operating Review
summary: CEO operating review — wins in diagnostics, decision to activate marketing, Tuesday proof-of-life process fix
contextSummary: Third week of planning-complete/execution-empty. DevOps sprint plan for Apr 14 is the strongest execution signal. Marketing activation ordered with Wednesday/Tuesday deadlines. April 26 is the hard checkpoint for MAU target revision. CFO still needs pricing/burn/split data.
